info.name: CHET.ai API
info.description: API collection for CHET.ai backend. Set base_url to your backend, for example http://localhost:8000.

item.name: Health
item.description: Checks MongoDB, Redis, Qdrant, and OpenRouter readiness. No query params.

item.name: Chat Stream
item.description: Streams a RAG answer using server-sent events. No query params. Body requires session_id and message.

request.description: Response is SSE with meta, token, and done events.

item.name: Chat - Flush Cache
item.description: Flushes all chat caches (exact + semantic). Use after ingesting new data or to force fresh RAG responses. Header x-ingest-api-key is required only when INGEST_API_KEY is configured.

header.description: Optional in local/dev unless INGEST_API_KEY is set.

request.description: No request body. Returns {ok: true, flushed: {exact: N, semantic: N}} with the count of deleted cache entries.

item.name: Hire - Start
item.description: Starts the hire flow. No query params. source can be chat, dock, or terminal:sudo-hire. website is a honeypot and should stay null or empty.

request.description: Returns session_id plus the first question.

item.name: Hire - Answer
item.description: Submits one answer for the current hire-flow field. No query params. Use the returned session_id from Hire - Start.

request.description: Field order: name, company, contact, email, address, message, send_details. send_details expects yes or no.

item.name: Eval Means
item.description: Returns recent eval score means. Query param: limit integer, optional, default 100.

query.description: Maximum number of recent eval means to return.

item.name: Ingest - Resume PDF
item.description: Uploads a resume PDF, extracts text, embeds chunks, and upserts them to Qdrant. Header x-ingest-api-key is required only when INGEST_API_KEY is configured.

header.description: Optional in local/dev unless INGEST_API_KEY is set.

request.description: No query params. Response includes embedded_chunks, points_upserted, sources, and skipped URLs/items.

item.name: Ingest - Sources
item.description: Summarizes source/kind counts currently embedded in Qdrant. Header x-ingest-api-key is required only when INGEST_API_KEY is configured.

header.description: Optional in local/dev unless INGEST_API_KEY is set.

query.description: Maximum Qdrant points to scan for source summaries.

request.description: No request body. Response groups existing Qdrant points by payload source and kind.

item.name: Ingest - URLs
item.description: Crawls portfolio, GitHub, or other URLs, extracts text, embeds chunks, and upserts them to Qdrant.

header.description: Optional in local/dev unless INGEST_API_KEY is set.

request.description: No query params. max_pages and max_depth limit crawl scope. GitHub repo/blob URLs are normalized toward raw README/file content where possible.
